test-case.description: Returns DryRun=true and lists planned stages without mutating

Limitations knowledge base.Has at least 10 entries

test-case.description: Every entry has the required fields
test-case.name: Limitations knowledge base.Every entry has the required fields

test-case.description: Supports raw XmlDocument callers for compatibility

test-case.description: Returns nothing on a non-matching line
